description: Fragment, acknowledgment of debt by an agent to an investor while forming a partnership. Yosef ha-Kohen was appointed to act as an agent of b. Hillel 'l-Maḥallī. Yosef acknowledges the receipt of 20 dinars from b. Hillel and was authorized to execute transations as he wished. (Information from Weiss' Halfon b. Menasshe PhD dissertation) NB: The IIIF link for T-S Misc.28.79 does not currently contain an image for T-S Misc.28.79.27, with coverage up to only T-S Misc.28.25.
description_he: מסמך משפטי ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
